key_items: Standard Chartered calls crypto bottom at $59,000 with conviction Bitcoin has bottomed
SpaceX joins public Bitcoin leaderboard as 8th largest holder with 18,712 BTC, legitimizing corporate adoption
Bitcoin ETFs return to positive territory with $86M net inflows and all 12 funds recording inflows
reasoning: Multiple confluence signals point to a market bottom and recovery phase: institutional conviction (Standard Chartered, corporate adoption via SpaceX/Strategy), strong ETF inflows reversing outflow trends, and whale accumulation in ETH suggesting confidence. Counterbalance comes from mining difficulty collapse indicating miner stress, inflation concerns, and Wall Street leverage dynamics creating volatility, but institutional infrastructure buildout (Kraken futures, staking standardization) supports a bullish 1-7 day swing.
risks: Unexpected inflation data or further margin collapse among miners could trigger a sharp retest toward $59k support if institutional conviction wavers.
